constraints: Must consult node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing any Next.js 16 code
MCP tools are read-only; no writes via MCP
site.ts is the canonical source of truth for site configuration

instructions: Fan-out/fan-in orchestrator. Phase 1 (parallel): Dispatch a1.author, a2.author, a3.author simultaneously for component, page, and style authoring. Phase 2-6 (sequential): Run a4.verifier to validate authored code, a5.bench to capture metrics, a5b.audit for security/dependency audit, a6.gatekeeper for quality gates, a7.publisher to deploy. If any child reports status=fail, abort the fleet immediately.
Author React components following Next 16 patterns
Author Next.js pages/layouts using App Router
Author CSS using Tailwind v4 @theme syntax

acceptance: No type errors, no lint violations, code follows documented conventions
instructions: Verify all authored code compiles cleanly and follows project conventions. Run type checking and linting. Report any violations with file locations and suggested fixes.

acceptance: Build succeeds, bundle size within budget, no regressions
instructions: Run production build and capture performance metrics. Record bundle sizes, build time, and lighthouse scores. Compare against baseline and flag any regressions.

acceptance: No high/critical vulnerabilities, all licenses approved
instructions: Audit dependencies for security vulnerabilities and license compliance. Flag any high or critical CVEs. Verify all package licenses are compatible with project requirements.

acceptance: All gates pass with exit code 0
instructions: Run all quality gates in sequence. If ANY gate fails, immediately abort the fleet and report which gate failed.

acceptance: PR created, Vercel preview URL returned
instructions: After all gates pass, commit updated benchmarks, push changes, create PR, trigger Vercel preview deployment, and return URLs to the human operator.
